Name: FALLING_PARAM
Description: Defines fall damage thresholds and mitigation values for different landing conditions and protective effects.

Fields.Name: Falling Damage (Safe Landing)
Fields.Description: Damage threshold for safe landings where no significant fall damage is applied.

Fields.Name: Falling Damage (Normal)
Fields.Description: Standard fall damage applied under normal landing conditions.

Fields.Name: Falling Damage (Danger)
Fields.Description: High fall damage threshold indicating severe impact risk.

Fields.Name: Falling Damage (Lethal)
Fields.Description: Fall damage threshold at which the character dies from impact.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage Reduction (Dodge)
Fields.Description: Reduces fall damage when landing during or after a dodge action.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage Reduction (Magic)
Fields.Description: Reduces fall damage through magical effects or buffs.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage Reduction (Ring)
Fields.Description: Reduces fall damage when equipping specific rings or accessories.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage Reduction (Stomp/Impact)
Fields.Description: Reduces fall damage from impact-based actions or ground interaction mechanics.
